title: Inventory of subglacial water in the Canadian Arctic

authors.name: Whyjay Zheng
authors.affiliation: Center for Space and Remote Sensing Research, National Central University, Taoyuan City, 320317, Taiwan.

short_description: This data set contains: Inventory: The inventory of the active subglacial water bodies in the Canadian Arctic. Workflows: Data analysis code that produces the study results. Results: The derived ArcticDEM strip data and visualizations generated by this study.
